headline: Foreign Faculty at Public Universities Falls to 4.2% Below Target
context: International academic staff at public universities declined to 4.2% versus the 15% target set in the education blueprint.

cards.big: Only 4.2% of public university faculty are international academics versus 15% target
cards.sub: Low salaries and bureaucratic hiring processes deter foreign scholars

cards.big: Average professor salary at Malaysian public universities is RM12,000 versus RM28,000 in Singapore
cards.sub: Salary gap of 57% makes Malaysia uncompetitive for regional talent

cards.big: Work permit processing for foreign academics takes 6-12 months on average
cards.sub: Administrative delays cause accepted candidates to withdraw offers

cards.big: QS internationalization scores for Malaysian universities dropped 8 points since 2022
cards.sub: Faculty diversity directly impacts global ranking methodology

cards.big: Global universities require global faculty—insularity produces provincial research
Should foreign academic hiring be fast-tracked with competitive compensation packages
